author: Ying
description: Export Markdown notes as paginated Xiaohongshu image cards with live preview and customizable typography. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ying
manifest.description: Turn Markdown notes into paginated 3:4 Xiaohongshu cards with live preview, cover images, avatars, typography, and automatic layout.
manifest.name: XHS Longform Exporter

name: XHS Longform Exporter

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Temporary compatibility release for the Obsidian Community scanner.\n- Publish without release attestations while the scanner adapts to GitHub's 2026-03-10 attestation API.\n- Preserve the small on-demand font package and SHA-256 font verification.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add standard Sigstore build-provenance attestations for all Obsidian release assets.\n- Verify main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css with GitHub CLI before creating the release.\n- Preserve the smaller on-demand font package introduced in 1.1.0.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Reduce the plugin package from about 49 MB to under 70 KB.
- Download the three optional OFL fonts only on first use, verify SHA-256, and cache them outside the vault.
- Add local PingFang SC support while leaving users' installed PingFang handwriting fonts unchanged.
- Keep custom font import support.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Stamp release assets with the current version so every release has unique, verifiable file digests.
- No user-facing functional changes from 1.0.0.

The public build bundles Xiaolai, Naikai, and CEF Fonts CJK under SIL OFL 1.1. Compatible fonts already installed on a user's computer can be selected locally; proprietary font files are not bundled or redistributed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Publish as an immutable GitHub release with verifiable release attestations for Obsidian Community review.
- No functional changes from 1.0.0.

The public build bundles Xiaolai, Naikai, and CEF Fonts CJK under SIL OFL 1.1. Compatible fonts already installed on a user's computer can be selected locally; proprietary font files are not bundled or redistributed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial public release of XHS Longform Exporter.

### Highlights

- Export Markdown notes as paginated 1080×1440 Xiaohongshu cards.
- Preview every page before export.
- Use the note filename as the cover title and render three heading levels.
- Adjust title, heading, and body font sizes independently.
- Choose from nine palettes and multiple paper textures.
- Includes Xiaolai, Naikai, and CEF Fonts CJK under SIL OFL 1.1.
- Detects compatible handwriting fonts already installed on the computer without redistributing them.
- Imports local TTF, OTF, WOFF, and WOFF2 fonts into the current vault.
- No analytics, uploads, or runtime network requests.

### Installation files

Obsidian installs `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release.
releases.name: XHS Longform Exporter 1.0.0
